generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator component for dynamic LED lighting control within building infrastructure, receiving control signals from the Digital Twin to adjust lighting conditions based on occupancy patterns, ambient light levels, and reinforcement learning policies."
]

instance HVACActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator component for HVAC system control, enabling temperature and humidity regulation through bidirectional communication with the Digital Twin for energy-efficient operation."
]

instance ReinforcementLearningController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Adaptive control logic component implementing reinforcement learning policies for optimizing building systems (e.g., lighting, HVAC) based on runtime data from post-occupancy sensors."
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Post-occupancy sensor deployed in operational buildings to detect occupancy patterns and movement, providing real-time data for adaptive control and space utilization analysis."
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance AmbientLightSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring ambient light levels in building spaces, critical for dynamic lighting control and visual comfort optimization."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightLevelDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Environmental sensor monitoring real-time temperature data for HVAC control, energy consumption analysis, and thermal comfort assessment."
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance HumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring humidity levels to support HVAC system optimization and indoor air quality monitoring."
    DTDFVocab:producedData HumidityDataTransmitted
]

instance EnergyConsumptionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Device tracking real-time energy consumption metrics across building systems, enabling predictive analytics and cost optimization."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Data Transmitted
instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance LightLevelDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AmbientLightSensor
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance HumidityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HumiditySensor
]

instance EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyConsumptionSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Building Information Model serving as the semantic backbone for the Digital Twin, enriched with device metadata (sensors/actuators) and control logic configurations."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMModelScanner, DittoDeviceManager
]

instance RuntimeDataModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Model-driven transformation output from BIM, generating standardized device management schemas for Eclipse Ditto runtime interfaces."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DittoDeviceManager, HonoTelemetryProcessor
]

instance ControlLogicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Reinforcement learning-based control policies for adaptive building systems (e.g., lighting optimization), dynamically refined through post-occupancy data."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ReinforcementLearningEngine
]

instance SimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics model for energy consumption forecasting and visual comfort simulation, integrated with runtime data streams."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PredictiveAnalyticsEngine
]

instance VisualizationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D interactive model rendered in Unreal Engine for immersive monitoring of building systems and real-time data visualization."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngineRenderer
]

instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy patterns collected from post-occupancy sensors, used for space utilization analysis and adaptive control."
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AdaptiveControlService
]

instance LightLevelData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Ambient light measurements enabling dynamic lighting control and visual comfort optimization."
    DTDFVocab:fromData LightLevelDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo LightingControlService
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature data supporting HVAC regulation, energy consumption analysis, and thermal comfort assessment."
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo HVACControlService
]

instance HumidityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Humidity measurements critical for HVAC system optimization and indoor air quality monitoring."
    DTDFVocab:fromData HumidityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo HVACControlService
]

instance EnergyConsumptionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time energy consumption metrics across building systems, enabling predictive analytics and cost optimization."
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EnergyConsumptionService
]

// C11: Enablers
instance BIMModelScanner : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-driven tool extracting 'twinnable' device metadata (e.g., tenant IDs, endpoints) from BIM models for automated DT configuration."
    DTDFVocab:enables DeviceConfigurationService
]

instance DittoDeviceManager : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto framework enabling bidirectional communication and runtime configuration of IoT devices within the Digital Twin."
    DTDFVocab:enables DeviceManagementService
]

instance HonoTelemetryProcessor : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono middleware handling real-time data exchange and telemetry streams from physical sensors to the Digital Twin."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataIngestionService
]

instance UnrealEngineRenderer : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 platform providing immersive 3D visualization and interactive monitoring of building systems and real-time data."
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance ReinforcementLearningEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Framework implementing reinforcement learning algorithms for adaptive control policy optimization based on post-occupancy data."
    DTDFVocab:enables AdaptiveControlService
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Engine performing predictive analytics for energy consumption forecasting, visual comfort assessment, and non-visual health effects."
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing real-time operational metrics (energy consumption, occupancy trends) through immersive 3D visualization in Unreal Engine."
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeOperationalMetricsInsight, InteractiveVisualizationAction
]

instance AdaptiveControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service deploying automated control logic (e.g., reinforcement learning-based adaptive lighting optimization) for energy-efficient building operation."
    DTDFVocab:provides LightingOptimizationInsight, ControlPolicyAction
]

instance PredictiveService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service offering predictive analytics for energy consumption, visual comfort, and non-visual health effects based on runtime data."
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyForecastingInsight, ComfortOptimizationAction
]

instance ModularServiceIntegrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service enabling custom plugin integration through standardized extension points for facility management tools and IoT analytics."
    DTDFVocab:provides PluginIntegrationInsight, CustomServiceAction
]

instance LifecycleManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service managing dynamic evolution of control policies and sensor configurations without redeployment, supporting post-occupancy learning."
    DTDFVocab:provides ConfigurationManagementInsight, PolicyRefinementAction
]

instance SpaceUtilizationAnalyzer : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service analyzing space utilization patterns based on occupancy data."
    DTDFVocab:provides SpaceUtilizationInsight
]

instance LightingControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service managing dynamic lighting control based on ambient light and occupancy data."
    DTDFVocab:provides LightingControlInsight
]

instance VisualComfortService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service optimizing visual comfort through adaptive lighting solutions."
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualComfortInsight
]

instance HVACControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service managing HVAC system control for temperature and humidity regulation."
    DTDFVocab:provides HVACControlInsight
]

instance EnergyConsumptionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service analyzing and optimizing energy consumption patterns."
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyConsumptionInsight
]

instance AirQualityService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service monitoring and optimizing indoor air quality."
    DTDFVocab:provides AirQualityInsight
]

instance CostOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing cost optimization recommendations based on energy consumption data."
    DTDFVocab:provides CostOptimizationInsight
]

instance DeviceConfigurationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service handling device configuration and metadata extraction from BIM models."
]

instance TwinningWorkflow : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service managing the twinning workflow and device integration."
]

instance DeviceManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service managing device lifecycle and configuration within the Digital Twin."
]

instance ControlPolicyDeployment : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service deploying and managing control policies in the system."
]

instance DataIngestionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service handling real-time data ingestion from sensors."
]

instance SensorProcessingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service processing sensor data for analysis and decision making."
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing visualization capabilities for building systems."
]

instance MonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing monitoring and alerting capabilities."
]

instance PredictiveService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing predictive analytics capabilities."
]

instance AnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing data analytics capabilities."
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance RealTimeOperationalMetricsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time insights into energy consumption, occupancy trends, and system performance metrics for operational decision-making."
]

instance InteractiveVisualizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization of building systems and real-time data in Unreal Engine for immersive monitoring."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance LightingOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimization recommendations for adaptive lighting policies based on occupancy patterns and ambient light conditions."
]

instance ControlPolicyAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated deployment of reinforcement learning-based control policies to building actuators."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EnergyForecastingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive forecasts of energy consumption enabling proactive cost management and resource allocation."
]

instance ComfortOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustments to HVAC and lighting systems for optimal visual and thermal comfort."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance PluginIntegrationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights into available custom plugins and their integration capabilities for extended DT functionality."
]

instance CustomServiceAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Deployment of custom facility management or IoT analytics plugins through standardized extension points."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ConfigurationManagementInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Dynamic configuration insights enabling runtime adjustments to sensor configurations and control policies."
]

instance PolicyRefinementAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated refinement of control policies through post-occupancy learning and reinforcement feedback."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// Additional Insights for Services
instance SpaceUtilizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analysis of space utilization patterns based on occupancy data."
]

instance LightingControlInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimization recommendations for lighting control based on occupancy and ambient light conditions."
]

instance VisualComfortInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analysis of visual comfort levels based on lighting conditions."
]

instance HVACControlInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Recommendations for HVAC system control to maintain optimal temperature and humidity levels."
]

instance EnergyConsumptionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analysis of energy consumption patterns and optimization recommendations."
]

instance AirQualityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Monitoring and analysis of indoor air quality metrics."
]

instance CostOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Cost optimization recommendations based on energy consumption data."
]

// C12: Environments/Components
instance BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PhysicalBuildingSystem, DigitalTwinSystem
]

instance PhysicalBuildingSystem : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical building infrastructure including sensors, actuators, and control logic embedded within operational buildings."
    base:isContainedIn BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment
]

instance DigitalTwinSystem : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Cyber-physical Digital Twin system integrating BIM models, runtime data, and visualization tools for real-time building management."
    base:isContainedIn BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment
]

instance SensorNetwork : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Deployed sensor network including occupancy, light, temperature, humidity, and energy consumption sensors."
    base:isContainedIn PhysicalBuildingSystem
]

instance ActuatorNetwork : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Building control actuators including lighting systems, HVAC units, and reinforcement learning controllers."
    base:isContainedIn PhysicalBuildingSystem
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Virtual-to-physical interaction occurs via **control signals generated by the DT** and transmitted back to physical actuators (e.g., lighting systems, HVAC units) through the Ditto middleware. The framework supports **runtime configuration management**, allowing the DT to dynamically adjust control logic (e.g., adaptive lighting policies) based on real-time data. This bidirectional flow is enabled by **standardized extension points** in the DT architecture, ensuring seamless integration with physical control systems."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time scale operates on a **real-time, low-latency basis**, with synchronization intervals aligned to operational requirements of Building Control Systems (BCS). The framework ensures **millisecond-to-second-level updates** for critical control loops (e.g., lighting adjustments) and **minute-to-hourly updates** for broader analytics (e.g., energy consumption trends). Eclipse Hono and Ditto facilitate near-instantaneous bidirectional communication, while Unreal Engine provides interactive visualization with minimal delay."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is orchestrated as a **service-oriented, modular architecture** with the following components:
   1. **BIM Core**: The semantic foundation for building data.
   2. **Middleware Layer**: Eclipse Hono/Ditto for real-time data exchange.
   3. **Control Layer**: Device modeling and runtime logic (e.g., adaptive lighting policies).
   4. **Visualization Layer**: Unreal Engine for interactive 3D monitoring.
   5. **Extension Points**: Standardized interfaces for custom services (e.g., IoT analytics, facility management tools).
   The constellation supports **scalable deployment** across heterogeneous infrastructure systems via **modular service integration**."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT operates across **all life-cycle stages** of the building, from **design (as-designed)** to **construction (as-manufactured)** and **operation (as-operated)**. During design, the DT leverages BIM models for **pre-commissioning simulations**. In construction, it supports **device modeling and commissioning**. During operation, the DT enables **real-time monitoring, control, and optimization** (e.g., adaptive lighting via BOREALIS). The framework also supports **post-occupancy adjustments** to refine control policies dynamically."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
   - **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric**: Evaluates the alignment between the DT and its physical counterpart in the **Living Lab case study**.
   - **Continuous synchronization**: Real-time data exchange maintains model coherence with operational changes.
   - **Verification mechanisms**: Automated validation of BIM models before deployment (implied by the mention of model scanning and metadata extraction).
   The framework does not explicitly detail **uncertainty quantification** or **clash detection** beyond general BIM capabilities."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The technical connection between the PT and DT relies on **Eclipse Hono and Ditto** for real-time data exchange, but specific protocols (e.g., MQTT, RESTful APIs) are not mentioned. The middleware facilitates **bidirectional communication** between physical sensors/actuators and the DT, ensuring low-latency synchronization. The document does not specify encryption (e.g., TLS) or IoT gateway details."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is deployed as a **scalable, service-oriented platform** with no explicit mention of hosting models (e.g., on-premise, cloud, hybrid). The framework supports **runtime deployment** of DT artifacts generated from BIM models, but specifics like Kubernetes clusters, GPU servers, or databases (e.g., InfluxDB) are absent."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Horizontal integration is achieved through **standardized extension points** and interoperability with **heterogeneous AECO systems**. The framework supports integration with **Building Control Systems (BCS)** and **sensor networks**, but specific protocols (e.g., OPC UA, BACnet) or external systems (e.g., ERP, city-scale DTs) are not mentioned."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The framework adheres to **AECO-specific standards**, particularly **Building Information Modeling (BIM)**, but does not explicitly reference specific standards like **IFC, IoT-DM, or MOF**. The document emphasizes **standardized integration frameworks** and **modular service-oriented architectures** for interoperability."
]
